news.t: Space ETFs: How SpaceX Is Reshaping the Theme
These ETFs surged thanks to early SpaceX stakes. What happens to them after the IPO?
ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
ETF Flows Top $500 Billion in First Quarter of 2026

holdings.infoBox: MARS is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Space Exploration Technologies stock at 21.46%, Rocket Lab at 11.60%, AST SpaceMobile at 8.10%, Globalstar at 4.37%, and Planet Labs PBC at 4.22%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Space & Technology ETF (MARS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks capital appreciation from an actively managed portfolio of global companies tied to the growing space economy and related technologies. Security selection uses a proprietary thematic-relevance methodology. MARS was launched on Mar 5, 2026 and is issued by Roundhill.
